case_title: SUKHOVITSKY FELIKS VS DEA MATTHEW MANAGER OF KRAGEN AUTO WORKS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,399.67 FILED BY SUKHOVITSKY FELIKS AS TO DEFENDANT DEA MATTHEW MANAGER OF KRAGEN AUTO WORKS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-01-1993 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-01-1993, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-26-1993 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SUKHOVITSKY FELIKS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEA MATTHEW MANAGER OF KRAGEN AUTO WORKS $1,399.67 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,419.67 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERT. RECEIPT TO MATTHEW DEA (KRAGEN AUTO WORKS) RETURNED SIGNED.
